prompt: Change the beach and ocean environment in the picture to a snowy mountain.
appearance_cot1: think: For quality-preserving edits, the intended change should not reduce overall image fidelity. The preserved regions should maintain comparable detail, contrast, exposure, and color neutrality relative to BEFORE; any new degradation patterns (noise, blur, cast, exposure issues, artifacts) indicate pipeline-induced quality regression., answer: {"color cast": "Cool color cast (medium)."}
semantic_cot2: think: Intended edit target: the beach/ocean environment—sand foreground, water, horizon line, rocks in the water, and the sunset sky associated with that seascape. Preservation checklist (non-edit regions): 1) House on the left (structure, roof, wall, window, and small wall) should remain unchanged—prompt does not ask to modify buildings. 2) Lighthouse tower behind the house should remain—part of the building complex, not the environment. 3) Dock/pier extending to the right with its posts/rails should remain—man‑made structure, not the environment. 4) Overall composition with the house on the left and structures extending toward the right should remain—only the environment backdrop should change.
